Affiliate Disclosure

Last updated: May 17, 2026

What this means

AI Tools Guide participates in affiliate marketing programs. This means we may earn a commission when you click links on our site and make a purchase or sign up for a service — at no additional cost to you.

Which programs we participate in

We are affiliates of programs including but not limited to:

  • Amazon Associates
  • PartnerStack (Notion, ClickUp, and other SaaS tools)
  • ShareASale
  • Impact.com

Our editorial independence

Affiliate relationships do not influence our editorial content. We recommend tools based on research and usefulness to small business owners, not commission rates. We disclose affiliate relationships clearly on every article that contains affiliate links.

FTC compliance

This disclosure is made in accordance with the Federal Trade Commission's 16 CFR Part 255: "Guides Concerning the Use of Endorsements and Testimonials in Advertising."
